description: Catalog-native companion for the official AgentPool CLI. It checks prerequisites, teaches the workflow, and delegates behavior to the real agentpool binary.

novel_features.name: Official CLI Delegation
novel_features.description: Passes arbitrary arguments through to the official agentpool binary without reimplementing provider, usage, session, or MCP behavior.

novel_features.name: AgentPool Onboarding
novel_features.description: Shows the official uv/pipx installation path for the Python agentpool-cli package.

novel_features.name: Agent Guidance Bridge
novel_features.description: Prints the official AgentPool skill guidance from the real AgentPool CLI.
